content.en:
In battle.

Ye Tian felt the aura of the other two masters, and they were constantly approaching.

"It seems that the other two Dominant-level Innate Blood Sons are also here, but they are not far from the exit, there is no need to continue fighting, just defend with all your might, take damage, and retreat quickly!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he didn't fight with the Dominant-level Innate Blood Son in front of him, and teleported with all his strength to the exit position.

Boom Boom Boom !!!

All the attacks of the Dominant-level Innate Blood Son were defended by Ye Tian, and the damage was also transferred to the Sea of Death Flowers.

No matter how powerful this master-level innate blood's attack was, there was no way to severely damage Ye Tian.

Just as the other two Dominant-level Innate Blood Sons arrived, Ye Tian came to the location of the stone gate of the Tomb of the Ancestral God.

Immediately, Ye Tian activated the sensor.

Outside.

The Lord of the Blue Feather felt the activation of the sensor and immediately opened the entrance passage to the Tomb of the Ancestral God.

Inside the Tomb of the Ancestral God.

Ye Tian stood in front of the stone gate, and suddenly a void passage appeared in the stone gate.

Before Ye Tian stepped into the Void Passage, he said, "Three masters, no need to say goodbye!"

After speaking, Ye Tian stepped into the void passage.

"No!"

The three Dominant-level Innate Blood Sons roared.

But when they came to the stone gate, they stopped one by one.

They did not dare to go out, because the duty of their birth was to guard the tomb of the ancestral god, and if they left the tomb of the ancestral god, it would be tantamount to betraying the ancestral god and violating the will of the ancestral god.

Therefore, they could only watch Ye Tian leave from the Void Passage.

Of course, they should be glad that they didn't leave, otherwise they would need to face the Lord of the Blue Feather in the outside world, and with their strength, facing a supreme would definitely be easily killed.

Outside the Tomb of the Ancestral God.

Ye Tian's figure appeared and stood in front of the Lord of Cangyu.

The Lord of Cangyu looked at Ye Tian and asked with expectant eyes, "Ye Tian, have you found the blood of the ancestral god?"

"Found it!"

Ye Tian took out all the twenty blood crystals of the ancestral gods.

This thing is useless to him, so he won't hide it privately, so it's better to give it all to the Lord of Cangyu.

"It's really the blood crystallization of the ancestral god, and it's still twenty, it's enough!

The Lord of the Feathers was a little excited.

Although the energy contained in these twenty ancestral god blood crystals was not worth mentioning to him, it was an introduction, an important and indispensable thing that could cause his innate bloodline to transform.

If he can use the blood crystallization of the ancestral god to transform the bloodline, he will have a closer hope, although he still can't surpass the supreme, but he can become one of the powerful supremes, and with his time avenue, it is enough to make the top supremes jealous.

"Very good, Ye Tian, I'll go and help you resurrect Zhou Tian first!"

The Lord of the Feathers promised.

"Thank you, Lord of the Feathers!" Ye Tian thanked.

"Let's go, go to the Terrans!"

The Lord of Cangyu took Ye Tian to the Terrans.

Soon, the two arrived at the Terran Sanctuary and were received by the Terran Kunwu Supreme.

"Lord of Cangyu, you are here, it seems that you have obtained the blood of the ancestral god, congratulations!"

Kunwu Supreme congratulated.

"It's still your Terran Ye Tian who is powerful, otherwise I wouldn't be able to get the blood of the ancestral god!" said the Lord of Cangyu with a smile.

The Supreme Kunwu chatted with the Lord of Cangyu for a few words, and then returned to the topic.

"Let's go, I'll take you to an attic where Zhou Tian used to stay in Tianlan Giant City, where you can resurrect Zhou Tian with the Lord of Cangyu! After all, the Lord of Cangyu, you are a foreign race, not a human race, and you can't enter the supreme hall of the human race, this is the rule of the human race!"

Kunwu Supreme Dao.

"I know that I can go anywhere, and after Resurrection Sunday, I will leave!"

The Lord of the Feathers.

"Good!"

Kungo Supreme nodded.

The Lord of Cangyu and Ye Tian followed the Supreme Kunwu to a certain attic in Tianlan Giant City, and the people around them were dispersed, so that no one would disturb the Lord of Cangyu to reverse time and space and resurrect Zhou Tian.

Standing in a room somewhere in the attic, the Lord of the Blue Feathers began to cast the great power of reversing time and space.

"Reverse time and space, go back in time!"

Rumble!!!!

The power of time is constantly running, even if Ye Tian's space-time power is relatively proficient, it is far from being able to compare with the time power of the Lord of Cangyu, this is the gap in the realm, and it is also the gap in strength.

Whoa!!

Countless pictures were reversed one by one, and soon, the Lord of the Blue Feather locked on to a certain picture in the past, which was the moment when Zhou Tian stayed here.

Rumble!!!!

The power of the Supreme invaded this time and space in the past, making Ye Tian feel an extremely terrifying breath of time and space.

At this moment, the Lord of Cangyu was extremely dignified, and a hand containing the power of time and the power of the Supreme forcibly probed into the time and space, grabbing Zhou Tian in the past time and space.

"Reverse time and space, return to the present! Universe Origin, retreat for me!"

Kunwu Supreme shouted, and Zhou Tian, who had passed through time and space, was forcibly captured by Ye Tian.

And on a deeper level, the Lord of the Blue Feather is also fighting with the Origin of the Universe, although it is not a head-to-head confrontation, but even the confrontation of the power of the Origin of the Universe is extremely fierce.

The Lord of Cangyu is using the power of reversing time and space to plunder a trace of Zhou Tian's soul origin from the origin of the universe, otherwise the resurrection of reversing time and space will not be achieved at all.

And this needs to bear the backlash of the universe origin, and he himself has the talent of time, the cost of reversing time and space is very small, and the backlash of the universe origin is not large.

Bang!!!!

A figure slowly condensed in front of Ye Tian, slowly recovering from the state of nothingness, and then slowly showing his breath.

Eventually, the full Sunday was resurrected!

When he opened his eyes, all of Zhou Tian's memories came back to life.

The moment he saw Ye Tian, he was full of shock: "Master, this ......"

"Sunday, you're resurrected!"

Ye Tian patted Zhou Tian on the shoulder and said.

"I, resurrected?"

Zhou Tian looked around and saw the Kunwu Supreme and the Lord of Cangyu, so he hurriedly said to the Kunwu Supreme: "I have seen the Kunwu Supreme!"

Kunwu Supreme hurriedly introduced the Lord of Cangyu to Zhou Tian: "This is the Lord of Cangyu, he resurrected you!"

"Thank you, Lord of the Feathers!"

Zhou Tian hurriedly thanked him.

The Lord of Cangyu waved his hand and said, "Don't thank me, it's just a transaction, if you want to thank you, thank you for having a good master, otherwise I won't resurrect you!"

"Master!"

Zhou Tian looked at Ye Tian with very excited and ashamed eyes, and wanted to say thank you, but he knew very well that this was not something that could be made up for with a thank you.

Although he didn't know how Ye Tian let the Lord of Cangyu resurrect him, the price he paid was definitely very large, even beyond his imagination.

"Sunday, take a good rest for a while, don't think too much!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Yes, Master!"

Zhou Tian responded.

"Ye Tian, it's time for us to go, the great opportunity I promised you, you must be very interested!"

The Lord of the Feathers urged.

He actually wanted to get everything done and concentrate on refining the blood of the ancestral god.

So, he's in a hurry.

"Well, the Lord of Cangyu, I'll go with you!" After saying this, Ye Tian said to the Supreme Kunwu and Zhou Tian: "Supreme Kunwu, Zhou Tian, I will leave with the Lord of Cangyu first!"

"Go ahead!"

Kunwu Supreme waved his hand and said.

Zhou Tian bent down and said, "Disciple sends off Master!"

Rushing!!

Ye Tian and the Lord of Cangyu left Tianlan Giant City.

In the void.

Ye Tian asked, "Lord of Cangyu, what is that great opportunity?"

The Lord of the Blue Feather muttered: "It's a great opportunity related to time, you should know that time talent and space talent are the two supreme talents that surpass other talents, the limit of other talents is god level, but time talent and space talent have the possibility of surpassing god level." But the universe has never heard of the time talent and space talent beyond the god level, isn't it strange?"

"It's really strange, but as a person with time talent and space talent, I also know that the limit of time talent and space talent is not god-level!" Ye Tiandao.

"Yes, it is true that the god level is not the limit of time talent and space talent, but what I want to tell you is that among the various races in the universe today, there are indeed no time talents and space talents who surpass the gods, but it does not mean that the universe does not. The area where we live now is the main space of the universe, and there are other unique spaces in the universe, which are located in the depths of the universe. It is rumored that the other spaces are the ones who have time talents and space talents, but no one has ever seen them. I don't know where there are time talents and space talents who surpass the god level, but I do know a place where there is a chance to transform your time talent. I went to that place before, but unfortunately I didn't have enough potential to make the talent of time transform. In addition, that place, a living creature can only go once in a lifetime, and must have a god-level time talent. "

The Lord of the Feathers said.

"Where is there such a place?"

Ye Tian was curious.

"It's in the Cangyu Realm!"

The Lord of Cangyu said: "It was precisely because I discovered that place that I created the Cangyu Realm in that place, and I have not moved territory in my life, and even fought with some supremes for the territory of Cangyu Realm, and even destroyed a race that rose near the Cangyu Realm. "

"Lord of the Feathers, why did you tell me such a secret? You can promise me another chance, there is no need to tell me such a precious fate, this secret is too big!"

Ye Tian asked suspiciously.

"Because I'm curious!" said the Lord of the Feathers, "I can't enter that place anymore, so that place is of little value to me." I'm curious, if you enter that place, will you be able to transform your talent, let your time talent transform beyond the god level. If I can see the time talent beyond the god level, it can be regarded as fulfilling one of my wishes!"

"So that's the case, no matter what, I'm still grateful to the Lord of Cangyu for giving me this opportunity!" Ye Tian said gratefully.

"Let's go, I'll take you to the Cangyu Realm, as for whether you can transform the time talent, it depends on your own circumstances!" said the Lord of Cangyu with a smile.

Rushing!

Ye Tian and the Lord of Cangyu quickly left the Terran area.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian and the Lord of Cangyu to arrive at the Cangyu Realm.
